_comment: Template for a Fabric Data Agent — Manufacturing / CPG. Replace <PLACEHOLDERS> before importing. Used as documentation reference — Fabric UI is currently the authoritative editor. Do not put real customer, brand, or plant names in this file.
name: agent_mfg
description: Answers commercial and operational KPI questions for a CPG manufacturer, grounded on sm_mfg_agentready. Uses anonymized market, plant, brand, and SKU labels only.

exampleQuestions.question: What was NSV last quarter?
exampleQuestions.expectedInterpretation: Filter dim_date to previous quarter; return [NSV QTD].

exampleQuestions.question: Show me year-over-year NSV growth by market.
What is the MAT volume in cases for our top brand?
exampleQuestions.expectedInterpretation: Rank dim_product[brand] by [Volume Cases MAT] desc; return top 1 with its [Volume Cases MAT] value.

exampleQuestions.question: What is OEE by plant this month?
exampleQuestions.expectedInterpretation: Filter dim_date to current month; group by dim_plant[plant_name]; return [OEE].

exampleQuestions.question: What is OTIF by trade channel month-to-date?
exampleQuestions.expectedInterpretation: Filter dim_date to MTD; group by dim_market[channel]; return [OTIF %].
